facts.SpecificPerformanceClause: 协议明确包含具体履行条款
facts.BreachAlleged: 被告于2022年7月8日以垃圾账户问题为虚伪借口终止合并协议
facts.BreachDetail_1: 违反第6.3条合理最大努力义务——未努力获取债务融资
facts.BreachDetail_2: 违反第6.11条公开声明义务——发布贬损性推文
facts.BreachDetail_3: 违反第5.4条信息获取限制——超范围信息要求用于构建退出借口
facts.DefendantActions: Musk 2022年5月13日发推称交易"暂时搁置"
facts.MarketContext: 特斯拉股价下跌，Musk不再想要该交易
facts.PlaintiffPosition: 5%垃圾账户数字是公开估计值，附有免责声明，不构成MAE
facts.RemedySought: Specific Performance (强制履行)——命令Musk按4.20/股完成收购
facts.IrreparableHarm: 金钱赔偿不足以弥补Twitter及股东损失

notes: REAL CASE. Twitter v. Musk, C.A. No. 2022-0613-KSJM, Delaware Court of Chancery. This is NOT mock data — actual complaint allegations from the most famous specific performance case in recent corporate law history. Tests whether FixpointEvaluator can handle: (1) multi-breach allegation topology, (2) specific performance as remedy (not just damages), (3) pretextual termination defense chain.
expected: BreachEstablished + DamagesCalculable. Specific performance is a unique remedy concept not in current US_CONTRACT_RULES.
